sentences.target: Im Film spielt sie eine Verbrecherin.

translations.de: Im Film spielt sie eine Verbrecherin.
translations.en: In the movie, she plays a criminal.
translations.es: En la película, ella interpreta a una delincuente.
translations.fr: Dans le film, elle joue une criminelle.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在电影里演一个女罪犯。
translations.yue: 喺套戲入面佢飾演一個女罪犯。
translations.pt: No filme, ela interpreta uma criminosa.
translations.vi: Trong phim, cô ấy đóng vai một nữ tội phạm.
translations.nl: In de film speelt ze een crimineel.
translations.hi: फिल्म में वह एक अपराधी का किरदार निभाती है.
translations.nb: I filmen spiller hun en kriminell.
translations.id: Di film, dia memerankan seorang penjahat.
translations.sv: I filmen spelar hon en brottsling.
translations.ro: În film, joacă rolul unei infractoare.
translations.da: I filmen spiller hun en kriminel.
translations.ja: 映画で彼女は犯罪者を演じる。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a locative PP and governing dative.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular; locative complement.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; occupies V2 position.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Verbrecherin'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative singular) denoting the role played.

sentences.target: Die Polizei sucht eine Verbrecherin im Viertel.
sentences.reading: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ zuːxt ˈaɪ̯nə fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn ɪm ˈfiːɐ̯tl̩/

translations.de: Die Polizei sucht eine Verbrecherin im Viertel.
translations.ipa: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ zuːxt ˈaɪ̯nə fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn ɪm ˈfiːɐ̯tl̩/
translations.en: The police are looking for a criminal in the neighborhood.
translations.es: La policía busca a una delincuente en el barrio.
translations.fr: La police recherche une criminelle dans le quartier.
translations.it: La polizia cerca una criminale nel quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 警方正在这一带寻找一名女罪犯。
translations.yue: 警方喺呢一帶搵一名女罪犯。
translations.pt: A polícia procura uma criminosa no bairro.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát đang tìm một nữ tội phạm trong khu phố.
translations.ar: الشرطة تبحث عن مجرمة في الحي.
translations.nl: De politie zoekt een crimineel in de buurt.
translations.hu: A rendőrség egy bűnözőt keres a környéken.
translations.hi: पुलिस मोहल्ले में एक अपराधी की तलाश कर रही है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία ψάχνει μια εγκληματία στη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Politiet leter etter en kriminell i nabolaget.
translations.id: Polisi sedang mencari seorang penjahat di lingkungan.
translations.sv: Polisen letar efter en brottsling i området.
translations.ro: Poliția caută o infractoare în cartier.
translations.cs: Policie pátrá po zločinkyni ve čtvrti.
translations.da: Politiet leder efter en kriminel i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 警察は近所で犯罪者を捜している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Polizei'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive predicate.
Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Verbrecherin'.

Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a locative PP and governing dative.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular; location.

sentences.target: Ich erkenne die Verbrecherin aus den Nachrichten.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ɛɐ̯ˈkɛnə diː fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn aʊ̯s deːn ˈnaːxʁɪçtən/

translations.de: Ich erkenne die Verbrecherin aus den Nachrichten.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ɛɐ̯ˈkɛnə diː fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn aʊ̯s deːn ˈnaːxʁɪçtən/
translations.en: I recognize the criminal from the news.
translations.es: Reconozco a la delincuente de las noticias.
translations.fr: Je reconnais la criminelle des infos.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认得新闻里的那个女罪犯。
translations.yue: 我認得新聞入面嗰個女罪犯。
translations.pt: Eu reconheço a criminosa do noticiário.
translations.vi: Tôi nhận ra nữ tội phạm trên bản tin.
translations.nl: Ik herken de crimineel van het nieuws.
translations.hi: मैं खबरों में दिखी अपराधी को पहचानता हूँ.
translations.el: Αναγνωρίζω την εγκληματία από τις ειδήσεις.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner igjen den kriminelle fra nyhetene.
translations.id: Aku mengenali penjahat itu dari berita.
translations.sv: Jag känner igen brottslingen från nyheterna.
translations.da: Jeg genkender den kriminelle fra nyhederne.
translations.ja: ニュースで見た犯罪者だとわかる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive predicate.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Verbrecherin'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative singular).
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source PP.
Definite article, dative plural; determiner of 'Nachrichten'.
Common noun, plural; object of 'aus' in dative plural; indicates the source ('from the news').

sentences.target: Zu Karneval verkleidet sie sich als Verbrecherin.
sentences.reading: /tsuː kaʁnəˈval fɛɐ̯ˈklaɪ̯dət ziː zɪç als fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn/

translations.de: Zu Karneval verkleidet sie sich als Verbrecherin.
translations.ipa: /tsuː kaʁnəˈval fɛɐ̯ˈklaɪ̯dət ziː zɪç als fɛɐ̯ˈbʁɛçəʁɪn/
translations.en: For Carnival, she dresses up as a criminal.
translations.es: En Carnaval, ella se disfraza de delincuente.
translations.fr: Pour le carnaval, elle se déguise en criminelle.
translations.it: A Carnevale si traveste da criminale.
translations.ko: 카니발 때 그녀는 범죄자 분장을 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 狂欢节时她打扮成女罪犯。
translations.yue: 嘉年華時佢扮成女罪犯。
translations.ru: На карнавале она переодевается в преступницу.
translations.pt: No Carnaval, ela se fantasia de criminosa.
translations.vi: Vào lễ hội, cô ấy hóa trang thành tội phạm.
translations.nl: Met carnaval verkleedt ze zich als crimineel.
translations.uk: На карнавалі вона перевдягається у злочинницю.
translations.hi: कार्निवाल में वह अपराधी का वेश धारण करती है.
translations.pl: Na karnawał przebiera się za przestępczynię.
translations.nb: På karneval kler hun seg ut som en kriminell.
translations.id: Saat karnaval, dia menyamar sebagai penjahat.
translations.sv: På karnevalen klär hon ut sig till brottsling.
translations.ro: La carnaval, se costumează în infractoare.
translations.cs: Na karnevalu se převléká za zločinkyni.
translations.da: Til karneval klæder hun sig ud som en kriminel.
translations.ja: カーニバルでは彼女は犯罪者の仮装をする。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP ('at Carnival').
Common noun, masculine; object of 'zu' in dative singular; temporal setting.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; part of the reflexive construction 'sich verkleiden' (V2 position).
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative singular; required by the reflexive verb 'sich verkleiden'.
Preposition introducing a predicative NP indicating role/guise.
Common noun, feminine; predicative complement after 'als' specifying the disguise (no article).

A Carnevale si traveste da criminale.

hu: A rendőrség egy bűnözőt keres a környéken.

Politiet leter etter en kriminell i nabolaget.
Jeg kjenner igjen den kriminelle fra nyhetene.
På karneval kler hun seg ut som en kriminell.

Polisi sedang mencari seorang penjahat di lingkungan.
Aku mengenali penjahat itu dari berita.

Polisen letar efter en brottsling i området.

Poliția caută o infractoare în cartier.

Na karnevalu se převléká za zločinkyni.

Til karneval klæder hun sig ud som en kriminel.
